title: stenandrium nephoica
intro: Stenandrium nephoica, also known as the "Blue Sage" or "Mexican Blue Sage", is a perennial plant native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Stenandrium nephoica include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
